$comment: SPIJ recon IR — captured 2026-06-09 via agent-browser HAR + direct curl. Drop into legalize-pe-engine/recon/spij.ir.json when wiring the SPIJ fetcher. Confirmed contracts marked confirmed:true; enumeration path is TBD (see notes).
source: SPIJ — Sistema Peruano de Información Jurídica (MINJUSDH)

auth.note: Hardcoded service creds, no captcha, no human login. JWT HS256, sub=spijext tipo=0, exp=+24h. Re-auth every <24h.

detail.note: THE goldmine. Works for ANY norm id with the free back-token. Returns full structured norm: real publication date + full body text. No OCR needed for the national tier.

response_fields.dispositivoLegal: DECRETO LEGISLATIVO (-> SPEC rank via maestros)
response_fields.textoCompleto: full HTML body — parse via packages/parser HTML->MD

taxonomy.note: Free-tier accessible. Use api/maestros for dispositivoLegal->SPEC-rank map; sector/agrupamiento are search facets.

search.note: PAYWALL FINDING: api/buscar is gated for the anonymous tier. Console shows tipoUsuario=usuariogratuito and the HTTP call NEVER fires for free users (client-side block). Param shape observed in console: {filtros, facetsSeleccionadas}. Do NOT rely on buscar for enumeration with the free token.

enumeration_strategy.note: Because buscar is paywalled, enumerate norm IDs WITHOUT it:
options: 1. Free-tier browse endpoints behind 'LEGISLACION POR MATERIA' and 'GOBIERNOS LOCALES Y REGIONALES' buttons — capture those listing calls next (they likely return id lists the free user CAN see).
2. Curated codes: the inicio page links all Codigos + Constitucion via #/detallenorma/{id} — scrape those H-ids directly, the high-value national core.

3. Cross-map the datos abiertos catalog (186K post-2013 rows: dispositivo+numero+fecha) — needs a SPIJ-id resolver; detallenorma has no reverse lookup, so this requires the browse/listing endpoint or buscar.
4. Evaluate a paid SPIJ account if buscar is the only complete enumerator — but free service since Nov 2024 suggests browse listings exist.
enumeration_strategy.next_capture: agent-browser session clicking 'LEGISLACION POR MATERIA' / 'GOBIERNOS LOCALES Y REGIONALES' with HAR on — capture the listing endpoint that feeds those trees.

politeness.legal_basis: DLeg 822 Art.9 (official texts public domain); SPIJ free since Nov 2024
